name: enforce-file for one project does not apply another project's rules (cross-project leakage is prevented)
command: ID=P556E03; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sid --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; printf '<template></template>\n' > App.vue; C=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file App.vue --include-app-code --project OTHER-556E 2>&1 | grep -oE 'rules_checked=[0-9]+' | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$C" = 0 ] && echo no-cross-project-leak 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
